hook: AI can't fix your roof, but it WILL take your desk job
concept: the jobs AI can't take from tradespeople
script: Everyone's freaking out about AI stealing jobs, right? [PAUSE] But here's what nobody's talking about — there are entire industries AI literally cannot touch. You can't have a robot electrician crawling through your attic at midnight. You can't have ChatGPT doing your plumbing inspection. [PAUSE] These jobs aren't going anywhere. Meanwhile, your college roommate with a marketing degree? Yeah, that position got automated last quarter. [PAUSE] Plumbers make an average of 63 grand a year. HVAC techs? 56 grand. Electricians? 62 grand. All with zero student debt, and all with job security that your four-year degree literally cannot compete with. [PAUSE] The trades aren't just safer from AI — they're literally recession-proof. People always need heat. People always need electricity. Your roof will always leak. [PAUSE] So while everyone's panicking about the future of work, tradespeople are just... working. And making bank.
